quote: The groundwork for all happiness is good health.
author: Leigh Hunt

quote: Take care of your body. It’s the only place you have to live.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: A healthy outside starts from the inside.
author: Robert Urich

quote: Your body hears everything your mind says.
author: Naomi Judd

quote: Health is not valued until sickness comes.
author: Thomas Fuller

quote: To keep the body in good health is a duty.
author: Buddha

quote: It is health that is real wealth.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: Small daily improvements are the key to staggering long-term results.
author: Unknown

quote: Exercise is a celebration of what your body can do.
author: Unknown

quote: The body achieves what the mind believes.
author: Unknown

quote: Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
author: Abraham Lincoln

quote: A little progress each day adds up to big results.
author: Unknown

quote: Healthy habits are learned in the same way as unhealthy ones.
author: Wayne Dyer

quote: Don’t wish for it. Work for it.
author: Unknown

quote: What seems impossible today will one day become your warm-up.
author: Unknown

quote: You don’t have to be extreme, just consistent.
author: Unknown

quote: Your health is an investment, not an expense.
author: Unknown

quote: Motivation gets you started. Habit keeps you going.
author: Jim Ryun

quote: Fitness is not about being better than someone else.
author: Unknown

quote: The only bad workout is the one that didn’t happen.
author: Unknown

quote: Push yourself because no one else is going to do it for you.
author: Unknown

quote: A one-hour workout is only four percent of your day.
author: Unknown

quote: Train your body to crave healthy habits.
author: Unknown

quote: The pain you feel today will be the strength you feel tomorrow.
author: Unknown

quote: Good things come to those who sweat.
author: Unknown

quote: Eat for the body you want.
author: Unknown

quote: Your diet is a bank account. Good food choices are good investments.

quote: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: Mark Twain

quote: If it doesn’t challenge you, it won’t change you.
author: Fred DeVito

quote: The difference between try and triumph is a little umph.
author: Marvin Phillips

quote: Health is the crown on the well person’s head.
author: Robin Sharma

quote: A fit body equals a productive mind.
author: Unknown

quote: Wake up with determination. Go to bed with satisfaction.
author: Unknown

quote: Your future self will thank you.
author: Unknown

quote: Energy and persistence conquer all things.
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: Wellness is a connection of paths.
author: Unknown

quote: Health is a relationship between you and your body.

quote: Take care of your body today.
author: Unknown

quote: Wellness is the natural state of my body.
author: Louise Hay

quote: The harder you work, the stronger you become.
author: Unknown

quote: Fitness is a journey, not a destination.
author: Unknown

quote: Healthy habits build a healthy life.
author: Unknown

quote: A healthy lifestyle is a lifelong commitment.
author: Unknown

quote: Balance is the key to health.
author: Unknown

quote: Healthy choices create a healthy future.
author: Unknown

quote: Good health starts with good habits.
author: Unknown

quote: A healthy life is a happy life.
author: Unknown

quote: Start today for a healthier tomorrow.
